Who We Are
At Intrepid you're not just another client, you're part of our tribe.
The Intrepid Team believes in what one could refer to as beach vibes.  We're successful yet humble.  We love the work we do because of people like You, but make sure it doesn't get in the way of living an amazing life.  Learn a bit more about each of us here.
Derek Notman
Founder & CEO
Hello, my friends call me Derek or DJ.  Thank you for taking the time to learn more about our team and what we do.  I'm a Virtual Financial Advisor, CERTIFIED FINANCIAL PLANNER®, Founder of Intrepid Wealth Partners, and also a tech founder of Couplr AI.
I launched Intrepid Wealth Partners to help cut through the complexity of "investing" to help my clients build lasting wealth, and live freely — without the financial chaos that often shadows success and the process of creating wealth.
​
I love dogs, surfing, cars, and world travel and am a serial entrepreneur.  A fun fact about me is that I have played chess with Sir Richard Branson multiple times and never won!
855-497-8737
derek@intrepidwealthpartners.com
Karen Nickler
Executive Assistant
I’ve had the privilege of being with Intrepid Wealth Partners since 2015, where I serve as an Executive Administrative Assistant. I love helping and serving our clients. It’s incredibly rewarding to be part of a team that helps people live their best life.
When I’m not working with clients, you’ll find me traveling, cooking, or spending time with my husband and our four children. Life is all about balance, and for me, that means cherishing family moments, exploring new places, and diving into delicious recipes.
A fun fact about me: I have a hidden talent for cooking — I’ve been known to whip up meals from different cuisines around the world and always welcome the chance to experiment with new flavors.
855-497-8737
karen@intrepidwealthpartners.com
Kristen Mueller
Compliance and Opperations
Hey, I'm Kristen!
My passion for excellence drives me to partner with advisors and firms to create customized solutions that streamline operations, ensure compliance, and foster sustainable growth. With more than 20 years of experience in financial services, I specialize in helping advisors free up their time so they can focus on what matters most—growing their businesses and serving their clients.
I hold the Series 65 license as well as life, health, and accident insurance licenses across multiple states, allowing me to address a wide range of client and business needs.
Outside of work, I enjoy spending time on the river with friends, camping, exploring nature, and taking road trips with my Miniature Schnauzer, Henry.
